description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a prominent black exterior and a wide, overhanging marquee labeled 'NEW AGE' in bold red letters. The front panel houses a large display screen showing a pixelated video game scene with blocky characters and a landscape, evoking a retro gaming aesthetic. Below the screen, the control panel is equipped with two sets of white joysticks and multiple colored buttons, arranged for two-player gameplay. The side panels are decorated with horizontal stripes in blue, red, and purple hues, adding a vibrant, modern touch to the otherwise minimalist cabinet. The back of the cabinet is plain black, with no visible access panels or artwork. The overall build suggests a sturdy, wood-based structure with plastic and metal components for the controls and screen.
description: A black upright arcade game cabinet with a 'NEW AGE' marquee, pixelated game screen, dual joysticks, and colorful striped side panels. The design is retro-inspired with modern color accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'NEW AGE' marquee, game screen, dual joysticks, and colored buttons on the control panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue and red horizontal stripes and the curved cutout for the control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned black back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view with the same striped pattern and curved control panel cutout as the left side.
attribute_screen_type: CRT-style display, flat with a visible bezel, medium size, typical of classic arcade cabinets.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two white joysticks and twelve colored buttons arranged in two sets for two-player side-by-side play, with a simple color-coded scheme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: The marquee features the text 'NEW AGE' in bold red letters on a black background, with no additional imagery or decorative elements.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Side panels are decorated with horizontal stripes in blue, red, and purple, with no additional artwork or imagery.
